MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-22-2006 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER DESIGNATING EXCEPTIONAL CASE AND TO VACATE TRIAL WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/16/07 AND MSC OF 12/27/06 ARE VACATED, AND THE CASE IS REFERRED BACK TO CASE MANAGEMENT FOR STATUS OF RELATED CASE #439126 GOLUBCHIKOV V. AYALA. NOTICE TO BE SENT BY THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: J. BRYCE, CSR #3321 (206)
